text:
There once was a young man named Freddy. Freddy loved collecting stamps. He had a huge collection. His favorite were birds.

One day Freddy went on vacation. He wanted some quiet time at a cabin in the woods.

That day was windy. A big black owl flew into his window. Freddy chased it. That night he couldn't sleep. Something was calling to him. He crept outside.

There was a great big owl. Maybe that owl knew Freddy. Freddy took out a small box.

The owl hooted some more.

That night Freddy slept.

And that owl knew.

That owl was a wise old owl.
